title: solidago virgaurea subsp. gigantea
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. gigantea, also known as Giant Goldenrod, is a subspecies of Solidago virgaurea, a flowering plant in the aster family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and soothing sore muscles. The health benefits of Giant Goldenrod include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Giant Goldenrod can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for convenient and accessible herbal preparations.
